title: options.claude
description: Per-session knobs for the Claude (`claude -p`) backend. Each field maps to a `claude -p` CLI flag (see spec §5.4.1). Unset fields produce no flag; the daemon passes through Claude Code's defaults.

agent.description: CC's `--agent` flag — selects a CC subagent by name. Distinct from the top-level `backend` selector; this lives at options.claude.agent.

agents.description: CC's `--agents` flag — subagent config map. Serialised to JSON on the CLI.

include_raw_events.description: Translation-layer flag. When true, every agent.* frame for this session carries a `raw` field with the un-prefixed CC stream-json dict. Default false.

user_echo.description: Translation-layer flag. When true, the daemon emits agent.user_echo for the user's input message — internally maps to CC's --replay-user-messages. Off by default; matches the codex backend's default so both backends are symmetric out-of-the-box. Tool-result events flow regardless.
